title: campylospermum vogelii var. costatum
intro: Campylospermum vogelii var. costatum, also known as a variety of the Campylospermum vogelii plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Ochnaceae. It is a shrub or small tree native to tropical Africa, valued for its medicinal properties. The plant is used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, the leaves and bark of Campylospermum vogelii var. costatum are commonly used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are consumed to harness its health benefits.
